About Us

Moving businesses through dependable transport

Double A Holdings Limited is a Tanzania-based transport and logistics company focused on helping businesses move cargo through reliable, safe and professionally coordinated services.

Company Overview

Transport solutions built around your business

Double A Holdings Limited provides road transport, maritime transport, air-freight coordination, warehousing and distribution support, customs-clearance assistance and end-to-end logistics solutions.

Our approach is guided by integrity, reliability, teamwork, innovation and excellence. We work to coordinate cargo movement around each client’s requirements while maintaining clear communication from pickup through final delivery.

Our Philosophy

Coordinated with purpose

We believe cargo should be handled with care, clarity and a clear plan. Every shipment receives attention to its route, timing and handling requirements, so clients can focus on their business.

01

Delivery

On-time service remains a central part of the company promise.

02

Quality

Each transport assignment is coordinated professionally and with attention to detail.

03

Safety

Cargo safety and responsible transportation remain priorities throughout the journey.

Service Capabilities

One partner. Multiple transport solutions.

Road TransportMaritime TransportAir FreightWarehousingCustoms ClearanceEnd-to-End Logistics
Values

Driven by values that keep business moving

01

Integrity

We do what is right.

02

Reliability

Clients should be able to count on us.

03

Teamwork

Strong coordination produces better transport outcomes.

04

Innovation

We seek better and more efficient ways to move cargo.

05

Excellence

We aim to maintain professional standards across our services.

Connected Logistics

From pickup to final destination

01

Enquiry

The client provides cargo, route and delivery information.

02

Planning

The shipment requirements and suitable transport method are reviewed.

03

Pickup

Cargo collection is coordinated from the agreed origin.

04

Transportation

Cargo moves through the selected road, air or maritime route.

05

Clearance and Handling

Required cargo-clearance and handling processes are coordinated.

06

Delivery

The shipment reaches its agreed final destination.

01

Enquiry

The client provides cargo, route and delivery information.

02

Planning

The shipment requirements and suitable transport method are reviewed.

03

Pickup

Cargo collection is coordinated from the agreed origin.

04

Transportation

Cargo moves through the selected road, air or maritime route.

05

Clearance and Handling

Required cargo-clearance and handling processes are coordinated.

06

Delivery

The shipment reaches its agreed final destination.

Why Double A

Professional transport backed by a clear commitment

Reliable

Count on us every time.

We coordinate transport services around cargo requirements, expected route and delivery priorities.

Professional

Experienced support and trusted service.

Our approach emphasizes clear communication, responsible handling and practical transport coordination.

Dedicated

Focused on your success.

We work to understand each client’s requirements and organize the appropriate logistics solution.

Let’s move your cargo forward

Contact Double A Holdings Limited to discuss road transport, freight, customs clearance, warehousing, distribution or end-to-end logistics requirements.
